title: PPP extended to May 31 – now what?
summary: The Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) Deadline is Extended to May 31, 2021 From the SBA: Today President Biden signed the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) Extension Act into law extending the PPP deadline from March 31 to May 31, 2021. Read the full statement from SBA Administrator Isabella Casilla...

title: Alaska SBDC Hosts its Final COVID-19 Briefing
summary: Last year, out of a dire need to disseminate information relevant to small business support and navigating the impact of COVID-19 on our communities, the Alaska SBDC began hosting daily briefings with the Small Business Administration (SBA) and The Foraker Group to ensure Alaskans had access to the...

title: ATJRC Website Launch
summary: The Rural Alaska Community Action Program, Inc. (RurAL CAP) is thrilled to announce the launch of the Alaska Tribal Justice Resource Center (ATJRC) website. We created the new ATJRC website in order to promote tribal self-governance, inter-community collaboration, and Alaskan sustainability. The web...
